parameters.command:
BASE_DIR="/tmp/apk_analysis_keenu"
REPORT_DIR="$BASE_DIR/report"
TEMP_EXTRACT="$BASE_DIR/temp_unzip"
APK_DIR="$BASE_DIR/apk"

# ---- Step 1: APK file locate karein (/apk/ folder only) ----
APK_FILE=$(ls -t "$APK_DIR"/*.xapk "$APK_DIR"/*.apk 2>/dev/null | head -n 1)

if [ -z "$APK_FILE" ]; then
    echo "ERROR: No APK/XAPK found in $APK_DIR"
    echo "Files in BASE_DIR:"; ls -la "$BASE_DIR/" 2>/dev/null || true
    echo "Files in APK_DIR:"; ls -la "$APK_DIR/" 2>/dev/null || true
    exit 1
fi
echo "Using APK: $APK_FILE"

# ---- Step 2: Old report clean karein (Docker root se) ----
docker run --rm -v "$BASE_DIR":/workspace alpine sh -c "rm -rf /workspace/report /workspace/temp_unzip"

# ---- Step 3: Fresh directories banayein ----
mkdir -p "$REPORT_DIR" "$TEMP_EXTRACT"
chmod 777 "$REPORT_DIR" "$TEMP_EXTRACT" 2>/dev/null || true

# ---- Step 4: XAPK extract karein ----
if [[ "$APK_FILE" == *.xapk ]]; then
    echo "XAPK detected. Extracting base.apk..."
    unzip -o "$APK_FILE" -d "$TEMP_EXTRACT" > /dev/null 2>&1 || true
    TARGET_APK=$(find "$TEMP_EXTRACT" -name "base.apk" | head -n 1)
    [ -z "$TARGET_APK" ] && TARGET_APK=$(find "$TEMP_EXTRACT" -name "*.apk" | head -n 1)
    if [ -z "$TARGET_APK" ]; then
        echo "ERROR: No APK found inside XAPK"; exit 1
    fi
    echo "Extracted: $TARGET_APK"
    cp "$TARGET_APK" "$BASE_DIR/current_target.apk"
else
    cp "$APK_FILE" "$BASE_DIR/current_target.apk"
fi
chmod 666 "$BASE_DIR/current_target.apk" 2>/dev/null || true

# ---- Step 5: JADX decompile ----
echo "Starting JADX: $(basename "$APK_FILE")"
docker run --rm \
  -v "$BASE_DIR":/workspace \
  abh1sek/jadx \
  jadx \
  -d /workspace/report \
  --no-res \
  /workspace/current_target.apk || echo "JADX minor errors, continuing..."

# ---- Step 6: Cleanup ----
rm -f "$BASE_DIR/current_target.apk"

# ---- Step 7: Success check ----
FILE_COUNT=$(find "$REPORT_DIR" -type f 2>/dev/null | wc -l)
SOURCE_COUNT=$(find "$REPORT_DIR/sources" -type f 2>/dev/null | wc -l)
echo "Report files: $FILE_COUNT (sources: $SOURCE_COUNT)"

if [ "$FILE_COUNT" -gt 10 ] || [ "$SOURCE_COUNT" -gt 0 ]; then
    echo "SUCCESS: JADX decompilation complete."
else
    echo "CRITICAL: Decompilation failed!"; exit 1
fi

=BASE='/tmp/apk_analysis_keenu'
DEST_DIR="$BASE/reports"

# Package name
if [ -f "$BASE/drive_pkg_name.txt" ]; then
    PKG_NAME=$(cat "$BASE/drive_pkg_name.txt")
    rm -f "$BASE/drive_pkg_name.txt"
else
    FALLBACK=$(ls -t "$BASE/apk"/*.xapk "$BASE/apk"/*.apk 2>/dev/null | head -n 1)
    PKG_NAME=$(basename "${FALLBACK%.*}" | sed 's/-[0-9].*//')
    [ -z "$PKG_NAME" ] && PKG_NAME='unknown_app'
fi

TIMESTAMP=$(date +'%Y%m%d_%H%M%S')
ARCHIVE_NAME="${PKG_NAME}_${TIMESTAMP}.tar.gz"
FIXED_LINK="$BASE/reports/latest_report.tar.gz"

# Clean reports dir completely before packaging
docker run --rm -v "$BASE":/workspace alpine sh -c 'rm -rf /workspace/reports'
mkdir -p "$DEST_DIR"

# Copy PDFs
cp "$BASE/mobsf_report.pdf"   "$DEST_DIR/" 2>/dev/null && echo 'MobSF PDF ok'   || echo 'MobSF PDF missing'
cp "$BASE/secrets_report.pdf" "$DEST_DIR/" 2>/dev/null && echo 'Secrets PDF ok' || echo 'Secrets PDF missing'

cd "$DEST_DIR"

FILES=''
[ -f 'mobsf_report.pdf'   ] && FILES="$FILES mobsf_report.pdf"
[ -f 'secrets_report.pdf' ] && FILES="$FILES secrets_report.pdf"

if [ -n "$FILES" ]; then
    tar -czf "$ARCHIVE_NAME" $FILES
    echo "ARCHIVE_NAME=${ARCHIVE_NAME}"
    ln -sf "$DEST_DIR/$ARCHIVE_NAME" "$FIXED_LINK"
else
    echo 'ERROR: No PDFs to package'; exit 1
fi

# Full cleanup — docker se taake root files bhi jaayein
docker run --rm -v "$BASE":/workspace alpine sh -c '
  rm -f /workspace/secrets_found.txt
  rm -f /workspace/secrets_report.pdf
  rm -f /workspace/secrets_report.html
  rm -f /workspace/mobsf_report.pdf
  rm -f /workspace/mobsf_report.json
  rm -f /workspace/mobsf_summary.txt
  rm -f /workspace/pdf_payload.json
  rm -f /workspace/current_scan.apk
  rm -rf /workspace/report
  rm -rf /workspace/temp_unzip
  rm -rf /workspace/apk
'
mkdir -p "$BASE/apk"
echo 'Full cleanup done!'

=APK_FILE=$(ls -t /tmp/apk_analysis_keenu/apk/*.xapk /tmp/apk_analysis_keenu/apk/*.apk 2>/dev/null | head -n 1)

if [ -z "$APK_FILE" ]; then
    echo "ERROR: No APK found in /tmp/apk_analysis_keenu/apk/"; exit 1
fi

echo "Scanning: $APK_FILE ($(du -h "$APK_FILE" | cut -f1))"

API_KEY="39763849070d97084e284a58bb18179e10e37ae2da4046437d816ce269c99d04"
MOBSF_URL="http://172.17.0.5:8000"

echo "Uploading to MobSF..."
UPLOAD=$(curl -s -F "file=@$APK_FILE" -H "X-MobSF-API-Key:$API_KEY" $MOBSF_URL/api/v1/upload)
HASH=$(echo "$UPLOAD" | jq -r '.hash // empty')

if [ -z "$HASH" ]; then
    echo "CRITICAL ERROR: Upload Failed. Response: $UPLOAD"; exit 1
fi
echo "Upload Success! Hash: $HASH"

curl -s -X POST -F "hash=$HASH" -H "X-MobSF-API-Key:$API_KEY" $MOBSF_URL/api/v1/scan >/dev/null

echo "Waiting for scan..."
for i in {1..120}; do
    sleep 5
    STATUS=$(curl -s -X POST -F "hash=$HASH" -H "X-MobSF-API-Key:$API_KEY" $MOBSF_URL/api/v1/report_json 2>/dev/null)
    if echo "$STATUS" | jq -e '.file_name' > /dev/null 2>&1; then
        echo "Scan complete!"; break
    fi
    [ $i -eq 120 ] && { echo "Scan timed out"; exit 1; }
    echo "Scanning... ($((i*5))s)"
done

curl -s -X POST -F "hash=$HASH" -H "X-MobSF-API-Key:$API_KEY" $MOBSF_URL/api/v1/download_pdf -o /tmp/apk_analysis_keenu/mobsf_report.pdf
curl -s -X POST -F "hash=$HASH" -H "X-MobSF-API-Key:$API_KEY" $MOBSF_URL/api/v1/report_json -o /tmp/apk_analysis_keenu/mobsf_report.json

echo "✓ MobSF Analysis Complete"

=# Clean old APKs, download fresh
rm -rf /tmp/apk_analysis_keenu/apk
mkdir -p /tmp/apk_analysis_keenu/apk

docker run --rm -v /tmp/apk_analysis_keenu/apk:/app ghcr.io/efforg/apkeep:stable \
  -a "{{ $('Edit Fields').item.json.package_name }}" \
  -d apk-pure \
  /app

# Normalize: copy downloaded file to known path
DOWNLOADED=$(ls /tmp/apk_analysis_keenu/apk/*.xapk /tmp/apk_analysis_keenu/apk/*.apk 2>/dev/null | head -n 1)
if [ -z "$DOWNLOADED" ]; then
    echo "ERROR: Download failed"; exit 1
fi
cp "$DOWNLOADED" /tmp/apk_analysis_keenu/current_scan.apk
echo "Normalized to: current_scan.apk"

# Save package name for Package node
echo "{{ $('Edit Fields').item.json.package_name }}" > /tmp/apk_analysis_keenu/drive_pkg_name.txt
# Package name file mein save karo (Upload node ke liye)
echo "{{ $('Edit Fields').item.json.package_name }}" > /tmp/apk_analysis_keenu/drive_pkg_name.txt
echo "Package name saved."

=FILENAME="{{ $binary.data.fileName }}"
# Extension remove karo (.apk, .xapk)
PKG_NAME="${FILENAME%.*}"
# Agar naam mein version ho (e.g. ws.krlp-1.0.apk) toh sirf package part lo
PKG_NAME="${PKG_NAME%%-*}"
echo "$PKG_NAME" > /tmp/apk_analysis_keenu/drive_pkg_name.txt
echo "Drive package name set: $PKG_NAME"

=BASE='/tmp/apk_analysis_keenu'
SECRETS="$BASE/secrets_report.html"
PDF="$BASE/secrets_report.pdf"
API_KEY='{{ $("Edit Fields").item.json.htmlpdf_api_key }}'

if [ ! -f "$SECRETS" ]; then echo 'ERROR: secrets_report.html not found'; exit 1; fi

# Delete old PDF first (root owned bhi ho toh docker se hatao)
docker run --rm -v "$BASE":/workspace alpine sh -c '
  rm -f /workspace/secrets_report.pdf
  rm -f /workspace/pdf_payload.json
'
echo 'Old files cleaned'

# HTML already ready — seedha jq mein feed karo
jq -Rs --arg key "$API_KEY" \
  '{html:., apiKey:$key, format:"A4", marginTop:10, marginBottom:10, marginLeft:10, marginRight:10}' \
  "$SECRETS" > "$BASE/pdf_payload.json"

curl -s -X POST \
  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -d @"$BASE/pdf_payload.json" \
  'https://api.html2pdf.app/v1/generate' \
  --output "$PDF"

# Verify
HEADER=$(head -c 4 "$PDF" 2>/dev/null)
if [ "$HEADER" = '%PDF' ]; then
    SIZE=$(du -h "$PDF" | cut -f1)
    echo "PDF ready: $SIZE"
else
    echo 'ERROR: API response:'
    cat "$PDF"
    exit 1
fi
